title: Hooray for EVA at NY Comic Con NY Animefest
display_title: Hooray for EVA at NY Comic Con NY Animefest
wikitext:
[]: Hooray for EVA at NY Comic-Con/NY Animefest!             Quote Post by Orichalcon » Mon Oct 11, 2010 1:52 pm So... Yeah. Generally frigging amazing. There was a huge Bandai Gunpla booth right near the entrance, and I spent a few hours salivating over the selection of stuff, including a full selection of Robot Damashii Side EVA figurines. I saw an exclusive EVA-01 figure there; Night Operation or something, but didn't pick it up. I then found another stand where I found a ANIMA Super Evangelion for $90, and snapped that up. Other than that, however, I didn't see anything else. However, the fact that even those things were present at a traditionally western-oriented con (NYAF was secustered downstairs mostly) is good to see!

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Tue Oct 12, 2010 9:40 am Damn great :) You got a pic of that knockout ANIMA figure?

[]:             Quote Post by Orichalcon » Wed Oct 20, 2010 7:04 pm Yeah, but I'll have to photobooth it, since I don't have a proper camera.

[]: Hooray for EVA at NY Comic-Con/NY Animefest!             Quote Post by Orichalcon » Mon Oct 11, 2010 1:52 pm So... Yeah. Generally frigging amazing. There was a huge Bandai Gunpla booth right near the entrance, and I spent a few hours salivating over the selection of stuff, including a full selection of Robot Damashii Side EVA figurines. I saw an exclusive EVA-01 figure there; Night Operation or something, but didn't pick it up. I then found another stand where I found a ANIMA Super Evangelion for $90, and snapped that up. Other than that, however, I didn't see anything else. However, the fact that even those things were present at a traditionally western-oriented con (NYAF was secustered downstairs mostly) is good to see!
